freeserversaver.help.title: Aternos Heap Guardian — commands:
freeserversaver.help.entry.status: /freeserversaver status — Current tier and heap percentage.
freeserversaver.help.entry.metrics: /freeserversaver metrics — Heap, tier, players, loaded chunks, view distance.
freeserversaver.help.entry.env: /freeserversaver env — JVM heap/CPU snapshot from server start (RAM Boost detection).
freeserversaver.help.entry.lagspikes: /freeserversaver lagspikes — Recent ticks over 100 ms with the heap state at the time.
freeserversaver.help.entry.topentities: /freeserversaver top entities — Top 10 entity types by count, with dimension breakdown.
freeserversaver.help.entry.inspect: /freeserversaver inspect chunks — Per-dimension loaded / forced / player counts.
freeserversaver.help.entry.prune: /freeserversaver prune — Identify unreachable loaded chunks (anchored flood-fill).
freeserversaver.help.entry.storage: /freeserversaver storage — World directory size vs the Aternos 4GB cap.
freeserversaver.help.entry.pregen: /freeserversaver pregen <radius> — Synchronously pre-generate chunks around your position. Max radius 16.
freeserversaver.help.entry.quarantine: /freeserversaver quarantine — Recently quarantined entities/block-entities (auto-discarded after 3 tick exceptions in 10s).
freeserversaver.tuning.title: Heap Guardian AutoTuner:
freeserversaver.prune.result: Chunk prune: %s isolated chunks identified. Vanilla will unload them within ~10 ticks.
freeserversaver.storage.error: Could not read world directory size.
freeserversaver.idle.first_join: Welcome — Aternos idle timer reset for as long as you stay online.
freeserversaver.pregen.yielded: Chunky is installed — use /chunky instead. Free Server Saver's pregen yields to it.
freeserversaver.quarantine.yielded: ExceptionGuard yielded to another tick-exception mod (Neruina / Bug Fix Mod / Failsafe). See that mod's report for incident history.
freeserversaver.quarantine.empty: ExceptionGuard: no quarantines recorded — nothing has been throwing repeating tick exceptions.
freeserversaver.quarantine.title: Recently quarantined (%s entries, newest first):

freeserversaver.history.empty: Heap Guardian history: (no transitions recorded yet)

freeserversaver.env.notyet: Environment snapshot not captured yet (server not fully started).

freeserversaver.env.line.heap: Heap max: %s MB  |  Heap used at boot: %s MB
freeserversaver.env.hint.low: Heap < 2 GB — check Aternos config, base tier should give ~2.5 GB.
freeserversaver.lagspikes.empty: No lag spikes recorded yet — server is running smoothly.
